shots.title: Inspiration registry — .slope/inspirations.json with CLI commands
shots.notes: Core: parseInspirations, validateInspirations, loadInspirations, linkInspirationToSprint, deriveId. CLI: add/list/link subcommands. Builder passthrough with conditional spread. MCP registry entries. 20 tests.

shots.title: Formalize context tiers (L0/L1/L1.5/L2) in docs and explore guard
shots.notes: Enhanced explore guard advisory with tier vocabulary. Updated CLAUDE.md and codebase-context.md with tier table. Two test files updated for new message.

shots.title: Import-graph blast radius — parseImports, buildImportGraph, blastRadius
shots.notes: Regex-based TS import parsing with .js→.ts ESM resolution. BFS with visited set for circular imports. Skips node_modules/dist/.slope. MCP-only. 19 tests.

nutrition.description: Test coverage strong — 48 new tests, all passing
Clean build, typecheck, zero regressions in 2695 tests

yardage_book_updates: buildScorecard uses explicit property construction — must add conditional spread for new optional fields
Explore guard advisory text is tested in two separate test files (guards.test.ts and guards/explore.test.ts)
course_management_notes: All three tickets independent — no ordering constraints. Shared files touched non-overlapping sections.
flows.ts pattern is an effective template for new file-based registries (inspirations followed it exactly)

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Clean sprint — all three tickets landed without hazards. The flows.ts pattern made S65-1 straightforward.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: When adding optional fields to GolfScorecard, remember buildScorecard uses explicit construction — conditional spread required.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: Import graph parsing via regex worked better than expected — handles all SLOPE barrel patterns including star re-exports.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: blastRadius can now inform scope analysis for tickets — potential guard integration in future sprints.
